groundTruth.title: SQL injection via template literal in user lookup
groundTruth.description: User-controlled req.params.id is interpolated directly into SQL query string

groundTruth.title: Missing authentication check on admin deleteUser endpoint
groundTruth.description: Admin endpoint has no auth/authorization check — any caller can delete users

groundTruth.title: Null dereference: profile.name accessed without null check
groundTruth.description: db.findOne can return null, but profile.name is accessed without optional chaining or null guard

groundTruth.title: Race condition in page view counter: read-modify-write pattern
groundTruth.description: SELECT then UPDATE is not atomic — concurrent requests will read the same value and produce incorrect counts. Should use UPDATE views = views + 1 atomically

groundTruth.title: Missing server-side price validation: negative prices accepted
groundTruth.description: Price validation removed from server, trusting frontend only. Any API client can send negative prices, corrupting order totals

groundTruth.title: Unhandled promise rejection in scheduleWelcomeEmail
groundTruth.description: sendWelcomeEmail() returns a Promise that is not awaited or .catch()'d — any rejection will be an unhandled rejection, crashing Node.js in newer versions

groundTruth.title: N+1 query: category fetched individually per product in loop
groundTruth.description: For 50 products this executes 51 SQL queries. Should use a JOIN or batch query with WHERE id = ANY($1)

groundTruth.title: Missing error handling in chargeCard: Stripe errors crash caller
groundTruth.description: stripe.charges.create throws on card decline or API errors. Without try/catch, payment failures become unhandled exceptions that crash the request handler

groundTruth.title: Dead code: return statement after throw is unreachable
groundTruth.description: The return statement on line 14 can never execute because the preceding throw always exits. Indicates a logic error or a refactoring artifact

groundTruth.title: Off-by-one in pagination: page 1 skips first 20 results
groundTruth.description: offset = page * limit gives offset=20 for page 1. Should be (page - 1) * limit so page 1 starts at offset 0
